title: Military Research and Development Division
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Military Research and Development Division''' was the arms branch of [[the Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania]]. It was newly opened in [[3963 BBY]], in the wake of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. It provided [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] musculature to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], a service that provided Adascorp with over half of its military revenue.

==Appearances==
*{{KOTORbackups|17}}
